description: Nowledge Mem Codex lifecycle hook — best-effort transcript capture after each turn

hooks.command: python3 "${PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/nmem-stop-launch.py" --event stop || python "${PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/nmem-stop-launch.py" --event stop || py -3 "${PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/nmem-stop-launch.py" --event stop
hooks.commandWindows:
python "%PLUGIN_ROOT%\hooks
mem-stop-launch.py" --event stop || py -3 "%PLUGIN_ROOT%\hooks
mem-stop-launch.py" --event stop || python3 "%PLUGIN_ROOT%\hooks
mem-stop-launch.py" --event stop
hooks.statusMessage: Saving Codex thread to Nowledge Mem...
